desc_pt: Julia Guimarães não admite ketchup na pizza, mas aceita no hambúrguer (desde que seja Heinz!).
desc_en: Julia Guimarães won't allow ketchup on pizza, but accepts it on burgers (as long as it's Heinz!).

desc_pt: Julia Spanopoulos pensou no conceito dos anos 50 para o projeto enquanto esperava o intervalo.
desc_en: Julia Spanopoulos came up with the 50s concept for the project while waiting for the break.

desc_pt: Esse site foi codado à base de 42 milkshakes de paçoca e muita playlist de rock.
desc_en: This site was coded powered by 42 peanut butter milkshakes and a lot of rock playlists.

desc_pt: Fazer você sentir o cheiro de batata frita só de abrir o nosso repositório.
desc_en: To make you smell French fries just by opening our repository.
